name: Simon Pierce | Stepson Series
description:
**HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG | HE'S A STINKY LOSER INCEL | AnyPOV but with FemPOV focus/bias | MADE TO WORK WITH MY [JAILBREAK](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit)**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Like father, like son...* So you've finally taken the plunge and decided to marry David, your long-term boyfriend who's not exactly the poster child for kindness, but hey, at least he's been your rock, sort of. Until you recently moved in with him, you'd only seen his son Simon a few times, and let's just say he's got a few... *issues*. David's always been quick to brush off Simon's less-than-charming demeanor, assuring you that beneath the layers of nihilistic angst, he's really a gem... just a very, very hidden one. In reality, however, Simon's far more complicated than David's ever been willing to admit.

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues (such as getting repetitive responses, the bot speaking for you, etc). At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.** 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience- It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. I can't guarantee how the JLLM will act, but it seems to work fine with my bots, generally. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*
